title: A Safe and Loving Home for Vulnerable Children
brief: Nicoville Foundation is raising support to secure a larger and safer home for orphaned, vulnerable, and street-connected children currently living in an overcrowded rented house. Your contribution will help provide a nurturing environment where children can live, learn, grow, and thrive with dignity and hope.
details: A Safe and Loving Home for Vulnerable Children

At Nicoville Foundation, we provide care, protection, and hope to children who have experienced some of life's greatest challenges. Many of the children under our care are orphans, vulnerable children, and former street-connected children who depend on us for shelter, support, and a chance to build a better future.

Currently, these children live in a small rented house that serves as their home. While we are grateful to have a roof over their heads, the space is overcrowded and no longer sufficient to meet their growing needs. The limited accommodation affects their comfort, privacy, study environment, recreation, and overall well-being.

We believe that every child deserves more than just shelter. Every child deserves a safe, stable, and nurturing home where they can learn, play, dream, and grow into confident and responsible adults. A larger home would provide adequate sleeping space, study areas, recreational facilities, and a secure environment that promotes their physical, emotional, educational, and spiritual development.

Our goal is to secure a bigger and more suitable home that can accommodate more vulnerable children while providing the quality care they deserve. This new home will become a place of hope, healing, belonging, and opportunity.
We invite individuals, churches, businesses, organizations, and well-wishers to partner with us in this important cause. Your support will help transform the lives of children who need it most.
By supporting this initiative, you are not simply helping us acquire a building—you are giving children safety, stability, love, and the opportunity to build brighter futures.
Together, we can give every child a place to call home.
impact: Provide safe and secure accommodation for vulnerable children.
Reduce overcrowding and improve living conditions.
Create dedicated study and learning spaces.
Establish safe recreational and play areas.
Improve children's physical, emotional, and mental well-being.
Expand capacity to accommodate more children in need.
Provide a stable family-like environment that promotes dignity and belonging.
Support access to education, mentorship, and personal development.
Protect children from homelessness, abuse, and neglect.
Give vulnerable children hope for a brighter future.
